Home / Services / Surge Protection

Surge Protection

Protect your electronics from power surges with whole-house surge protection.

San Diego's occasional power surges can damage sensitive electronics, from computers to appliances. Vazproz Electric offers whole-house surge protection to safeguard your valuable equipment. A surge protector diverts excess voltage away from your electrical system, preventing damage from power surges caused by lightning, utility fluctuations, or internal sources. We install surge protection devices at your electrical panel, providing comprehensive protection for your entire home.

We assess your home's electrical needs and recommend the appropriate surge protection solution. Our experienced electricians handle the installation process, ensuring proper grounding and compliance with electrical codes. With whole-house surge protection, you can rest assured that your electronics are safe from damaging power surges. We serve San Diego county, offering peace of mind from La Jolla to Chula Vista.

Don't risk losing expensive electronics. Contact Vazproz Electric today to learn more about whole-house surge protection and protect your investment.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Assess your home's electrical system and surge protection needs.
  2. 02 Step 2: Recommend the appropriate surge protection device.
  3. 03 Step 3: Install the surge protection device at your electrical panel.
  4. 04 Step 4: Ensure proper grounding and wiring.
  5. 05 Step 5: Test the surge protection device to ensure proper operation.

Benefits

  • Protection for sensitive electronics
  • Prevention of damage from power surges
  • Peace of mind
  • Increased lifespan of electronics
  • Compliance with San Diego electrical codes

Frequently Asked Questions

What causes power surges?

Power surges can be caused by lightning strikes, utility fluctuations, or internal sources such as appliances turning on and off.

How does whole-house surge protection work?

Whole-house surge protection diverts excess voltage away from your electrical system, preventing damage from power surges.

Is whole-house surge protection expensive?

Whole-house surge protection is a cost-effective way to protect your valuable electronics. The cost is typically less than the cost of replacing damaged equipment.

Get a Free Estimate
